info.description: Exam authoring, scheduling, publishing, and question bank management service.
info.title: Veritas Exam Service API

get.description: List exams with  sorting and filtering support for the caller enterprise.

parameters.description: Number of items per page (default: 10, max: 1000)
parameters.name: limit

parameters.description: Sort field (allowed: created_at, updated_at, title, duration_minutes, passing_score_percent, status) (default: created_at)
parameters.name: sort

post.description: Create one exam under the caller enterprise.

get.description: Get one exam for the caller enterprise.

post.description: Clone exam content into a new exam with provided title.

get.description: Get question mappings for one exam with

parameters.description: Number of items per page (default: 10, max: 1000)
parameters.name: limit

post.description: Attach multiple questions to an exam with optional override points and order indices.

delete.description: Remove one question mapping from exam.

patch.description: Update points override or order index for an exam question mapping.

post.description: Add rule for selecting random questions by topic/difficulty.

delete.description: Delete one randomization rule from an exam.

post.description: Set start and end times for an exam.

get.description: Returns a simple JSON indicating the service is alive.
List questions with  sorting and filtering support for the caller enterprise.

parameters.description: Number of items per page (default: 10, max: 1000)
parameters.name: limit

parameters.description: Sort field (allowed: created_at, updated_at, title, difficulty, type, points) (default: created_at)
parameters.name: sort

post.description: Create one question under the caller enterprise.

get.description: Get a question by ID for the caller enterprise.

delete.description: Delete one question from the caller enterprise.
